name: Smoked Salmon Canapes
recipeIngredient: 2 oz smoked salmon, cut into 36 thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheese, lime rind, onion powder, and Worcestershire sauce in a small mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth.
2. Cut the jicama into 1/4 inch thick slices. Then cut each slice into 2-inch squares to make 36 triangles.
3. Discard any remaining jicama. Rub the longest side of each triangle with a lime wedge.
4. Dip one side of each triangle in the pepper mixture.
5. Pipe or spoon about 1 tablespoon of the cheese mixture onto each triangle.
6. Top each triangle with a salmon strip.
(These canapes are low in fat and contain approximately 3 milligrams of cholesterol.)
